title: Turkish-Style Chickpea Pilaf
description: A hearty, flavorful pilaf dish made with chickpeas, intense spices, and a hint of turkish flair.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chickpeas, pilaf rice, intense spice blend, salt, and black pepper to the saucepan.
Stir to combine and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is tender.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
